node.statement: APPROX A1 (Born-Oppenheimer): Ions frozen at lattice sites. Bloch theorem -> band structure. Conduction band minimum at Gamma point in GaAs is isotropic and parabolic: E(k)=hbar^2*k^2/(2m*) with m*=0.067*m_e. REPLACES: V_crystal + bare m_e WITH: effective mass m*. NEGLECTED: inter-band transitions (cost ~1.52 eV gap), non-parabolicity (k^4 terms). ERROR: <10^{-6} at FQHE energies. [P11-Girvin p.4 footnote 2]
